title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-83: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of home light therapy equipment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-83部分：家用光疗设备的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.scope: Particular requirements for home healthcare environment light therapy equipment
standards.abstract: Applies to basic safety and essential performance of home healthcare environment light therapy equipment. Amendment A1:2025 incorporates latest technical and scientific progress.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第1部分：基本安全和基本性能的通用要求

standards.scope: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance of medical electrical equipment
standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements and serves as the basis for particular requirements of IEC 60601-2 series. Amendment A13:2024 adapts the standard to EU MDR requirements.
